'''竏嘖-r-d-dh''' ('''kasardedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:forebar|forebar]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-r-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:forebar|forebar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嘖-r-d-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kasardedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
